hourly_summary: 本小时共收录 105 条：AI 40 条、策略交易 10 条、加密货币 25 条、世界事件 20 条、财经 10 条。重点关注：【FINANCE】市场预计沃什美联储将比预期更加鹰派；【FINANCE】杰弗里·冈拉克 (Jeffrey Gundlach) 表示，美联储的沃什不会成为许多人希望的“轻松赚钱”主席；【FINANCE】由于几位成员暗示 2026 年加息，主席沃什放弃给出利率预测。

items.title: Markets are set for a much more hawkish Warsh Fed than expected
items.summary: Fed Chairman Kevin Warsh's tough talk on inflation Wednesday reverberated through financial markets.
items.title_zh: 市场预计沃什美联储将比预期更加鹰派
items.summary_zh: 美联储主席凯文·沃什周三关于通胀的强硬言论在金融市场引起反响。

items.title: Jeffrey Gundlach says Fed's Warsh is not going to be the 'easy money' chairman many hoped for
items.summary: Gundlach said Warsh's stance reduces the risk of overly accommodative monetary policy that could reignite inflation and push longer-term borrowing costs higher.
items.title_zh: 杰弗里·冈拉克 (Jeffrey Gundlach) 表示，美联储的沃什不会成为许多人希望的“轻松赚钱”主席
items.summary_zh: 冈拉克表示，沃什的立场降低了过度宽松货币政策的风险，这种政策可能会重新引发通胀并推高长期借贷成本。

items.title: Chairman Warsh abstains from giving rate forecast as several members signal a hike in 2026
items.summary: The median projection called for the federal funds rate to end 2026 at 3.8%, a quarter percentage point above the current target range.
items.title_zh: 由于几位成员暗示 2026 年加息，主席沃什放弃给出利率预测
items.summary_zh: 预计联邦基金利率到 2026 年底将达到 3.8%，比当前目标范围高出四分之一个百分点。

items.title: Bitcoin mining network becoming more sensitive to price swings, JPMorgan says
items.summary: A growing share of miners are operating near breakeven levels, making hashrate and mining difficulty increasingly responsive to bitcoin's price movements, the bank said.
items.title_zh: 摩根大通表示，比特币挖矿网络对价格波动变得更加敏感
items.summary_zh: 该银行表示，越来越多的矿商正在接近盈亏平衡的水平运营，这使得算力和挖矿难度对比特币价格走势的反应越来越敏感。

items.title: 'Regime change but in a velvet glove': How Kevin Warsh has set out to remake the Fed
items.summary: The first big announced changes point toward a quiet revolution, with task forces set up to rethink virtually everything done at the Fed.
items.title_zh: “政权更迭，但戴着丝绒手套”：凯文·沃什如何着手重塑美联储
items.summary_zh: 第一个宣布的重大变化预示着一场悄然的革命，成立了特别工作组来重新思考美联储所做的几乎所有事情。

items.title: Ether’s biggest corporate holders back new Ethereum research hub
items.summary: Ethlabs was formed with support from SharpLink, Bitmine and Consensys CEO Joe Lubin as the network's development is expanding beyond the Ethereum Foundation.
items.title_zh: 以太坊最大的企业持有者支持新的以太坊研究中心
items.summary_zh: Ethlabs 是在 SharpLink、Bitmine 和 Consensys 首席执行官 Joe Lubin 的支持下成立的，因为该网络的发展正在扩展到以太坊基金会之外。

items.title: Strategy added $35 million in bitcoin, $300 million in cash reserves last week
items.summary: The boost to cash reserves is meant to reassure investors about dividend payments on the company's hard-hit preferred shares, STRC.
items.title_zh: Strategy上周增加了3500万美元的比特币和3亿美元的现金储备
items.summary_zh: 增加现金储备的目的是为了让投资者放心，该公司遭受重创的优先股STRC的股息支付。

items.title: HIVE stock surges 25% as Ivy League researchers train neural networks on Paraguay GPUs
items.summary: The research was submitted to NeurIPS, one of AI's leading academic conferences, to be held later this year.
items.title_zh: 常春藤盟校研究人员在巴拉圭 GPU 上训练神经网络，HIVE 股价飙升 25%
items.summary_zh: 该研究已提交给将于今年晚些时候举行的 AI 领先学术会议之一 NeurIPS。

items.title: MIT’s Initiative for New Manufacturing builds momentum
items.summary: In its first year, INM has worked across research, workforce development, and industry engagement to help accelerate new manufacturing technologies and their real-world deployment.
items.title_zh: 麻省理工学院的新制造倡议蓄势待发
items.summary_zh: 在成立的第一年，INM 致力于研究、劳动力发展和行业参与，以帮助加速新制造技术及其在现实世界的部署。

items.title: When it comes to predicting people’s preferences, it pays to consider “the power of three”
items.summary: MIT researchers provide a major upgrade to the nearly century-old idea of random utility models.
items.title_zh: 在预测人们的偏好时，考虑“三者的力量”是值得的
items.summary_zh: 麻省理工学院的研究人员对近百年历史的随机效用模型理念进行了重大升级。

items.title: Alan Greenspan, former chairman of the Fed, dies at age 100
items.summary: Alan Greenspan presided over the Federal Reserve for 19 years under four presidents and mastered the art of obfuscation known as Fedspeak.
items.title_zh: 美联储前主席艾伦·格林斯潘去世，享年 100 岁
items.summary_zh: 艾伦·格林斯潘 (Alan Greenspan) 在四位总统的领导下执掌美联储 19 年，并掌握了被称为 Fedspeak 的混淆艺术。

items.title: U.S. and Iran begin peace talks amid conflicting claims over Strait of Hormuz
items.summary: Iran's military said it had closed the Strait of Hormuz in response to continued Israeli military strikes in Lebanon; the U.S. said it remains open.
items.title_zh: 美国和伊朗在霍尔木兹海峡主权争议中开始和平谈判
items.summary_zh: 伊朗军方表示，已关闭霍尔木兹海峡，以回应以色列对黎巴嫩的持续军事打击；美国表示仍保持开放。

items.title: The riskiest SpaceX stock trade of all had a big first week
items.summary: SpaceX's IPO did not just mint the biggest debut in market history and a trillionaire, but it also triggered a historic land grab in risky leveraged ETFs.
items.title_zh: 风险最高的 SpaceX 股票交易首周表现强劲
items.summary_zh: SpaceX 的 IPO 不仅创造了市场历史上最大的首次公开募股和万亿富翁，而且还引发了风险杠杆 ETF 的历史性抢滩。

items.title: Russian troop build-up threatens city seen as key to seizing Ukraine's Donbas
items.summary: If Kostyantynivka falls, Russian forces would be able push towards Ukraine's last remaining strongholds in the east.
items.title_zh: 俄罗斯军队集结威胁被视为夺取乌克兰顿巴斯关键的城市
items.summary_zh: 如果科斯特扬季尼夫卡陷落，俄罗斯军队将能够向乌克兰东部仅存的最后据点推进。

items.title: Thousands Are Fleeing as Putin Bombs the Donbas Cities He Most Covets
items.summary: While Kyiv’s fortunes have brightened in other ways in the war, Moscow’s forces are raining bombs and drones on “fortress belt” cities like Sloviansk and Kramatorsk.
items.title_zh: 普京轰炸他最觊觎的顿巴斯城市，数千人逃离
items.summary_zh: 虽然基辅的命运在战争中以其他方式变得光明，但莫斯科军队却向斯洛维斯克和克拉马托尔斯克等“堡垒地带”城市投下炸弹和无人机。

items.title: Explosion at Qatar Gas Plant Kills at Least 13 and Injures 66
items.summary: The blast happened at a key site for natural gas production. The authorities blamed a technical malfunction while operations were being restarted after the U.S.-Israeli war against Iran.
items.title_zh: 卡塔尔天然气厂爆炸造成至少 13 人死亡、66 人受伤
items.summary_zh: 爆炸发生在天然气生产的关键地点。当局将此归咎于美以对伊朗战争后恢复运营时出现的技术故障。

items.title: How Will Colombia’s New President Fuel Trump’s Drug War?
items.summary: Abelardo De La Espriella, who has vowed to destroy traffickers with military power, appears set to be the country’s next president.
items.title_zh: 哥伦比亚新​​总统将如何助长特朗普的毒品战争？
items.summary_zh: 阿韦拉多·德拉埃斯普里埃拉发誓要用军事力量消灭贩运者，他似乎将成为该国的下一任总统。

items.title: First Round of U.S.-Iran Talks Ends With High Hopes and Big Challenges
items.summary: Mediators reported progress toward reaching a final deal within 60 days. They also said that negotiators had dwelled on issues that were supposed to be settled.
items.title_zh: 第一轮美伊会谈结束，充满希望，挑战巨大
items.summary_zh: 调解员报告了在 60 天内达成最终协议的进展情况。他们还表示，谈判代表已经讨论了本应解决的问题。

items.title: Anchorage aims to bring banks onchain with new tokenized deposit platform
items.summary: The crypto bank aims to help financial institutions offer round-the-clock payments and settlement without replacing their core systems.
items.title_zh: 安克雷奇旨在通过新的代币化存款平台将银行带入链上
items.summary_zh: 该加密银行旨在帮助金融机构提供全天候支付和结算，而无需更换其核心系统。

items.title: MoneyGram joins Solana as validator amid stablecoin payment push
items.summary: The remittances firm has become a validator on the Solana blockchain, helping process and secure transactions as it expands its stablecoin payments strategy.
items.title_zh: MoneyGram 加入 Solana 成为稳定币支付推动下的验证者
items.summary_zh: 这家汇款公司已成为 Solana 区块链上的验证者，在扩展其稳定币支付策略时帮助处理和保护交易。

items.title: Gate CrossEx: An Exchange-Native Answer to the Institutional Capital Fragmentation Problem
items.summary: For sophisticated crypto desks, the bottleneck has rarely been finding liquidity, but rather moving capital fast enough to use it. A fund running active books across the largest CEXs operates multiple separate balance sheets that don’t talk to each other. Every account must be fu
items.title_zh: Gate CrossEx：针对机构资本碎片化问题的交易所原生解决方案
items.summary_zh: 对于复杂的加密货币柜台来说，瓶颈很少不是寻找流动性，而是足够快地转移资本以使用它。一家在最大的中央交易所运营活跃账簿的基金运营着多个独立的资产负债表，这些资产负债表彼此之间互不影响。每个账户都必须是fu

items.title: Crypto industry groups urge Congress to pass tax staking and mining bill unchanged
items.summary: Crypto advocacy groups are urging Congress to pass a tax bill, saying the measure would provide clarity on mining and staking rewards.
items.title_zh: 加密行业团体敦促国会原封不动地通过税收质押和采矿法案
items.summary_zh: 加密货币倡导团体正在敦促国会通过一项税收法案，称该措施将为挖矿和质押奖励提供明确性。

items.title: Tom Lee says ‘best years for crypto remain ahead’ as Bitmine buys another 52,203 ETH
items.summary: Bitmine added 52,203 ETH, lifting holdings to 5.67 million ETH as Tom Lee reiterated long-term crypto optimism outlook.
items.title_zh: Tom Lee 表示，Bitmine 又购买了 52,203 枚 ETH，“加密货币的最佳岁月仍在前方”
items.summary_zh: 随着 Tom Lee 重申长期加密货币乐观前景，Bitmine 增持了 52,203 ETH，持仓量达到 567 万 ETH。

items.title: Trending Crypto: Arcium (ARX)
items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #382.
items.title_zh: 热门加密货币：Arcium (ARX)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名#382。

items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #398.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：Synapse (SYN)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名#398。

items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #10.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：Hyperliquid (HYPE)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第 10。

items.title: Trending Crypto: Aerodrome Finance (AERO)
items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #100.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：机场金融 (AERO)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第 100。

items.title: Trending Crypto: Sui (SUI)
items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #32.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：Sui (SUI)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第 32 位。

items.title: Using AI to help physicians diagnose rare genetic diseases affecting children
items.summary: Researchers used an OpenAI reasoning model to help diagnose rare diseases, identifying 18 new diagnoses in previously unsolved cases.
items.title_zh: 使用人工智能帮助医生诊断影响儿童的罕见遗传病
items.summary_zh: 研究人员使用 OpenAI 推理模型来帮助诊断罕见疾病，在之前未解决的病例中识别出了 18 种新的诊断结果。

items.title: From the Hugging Face Hub to robot hardware with Strands Agents and LeRobot
items.title_zh: 从 Hugging Face Hub 到 Strands Agents 和 LeRobot 的机器人硬件

items.title: A better way to model the behavior of metal alloys
items.summary: MIT researchers’ approach captures subtle atomic patterns, improving predictions of material properties.
items.title_zh: 模拟金属合金行为的更好方法
items.summary_zh: 麻省理工学院研究人员的方法捕捉微妙的原子模式，改善对材料特性的预测。

items.title: Jinhua Zhao named head of the Department of Urban Studies and Planning
items.summary: An expert in behavioral science and transportation, Zhao combines these studies with AI and public policy to address some of the most urgent challenges facing cities.
items.title_zh: 赵金华出任城市研究与规划系主任
items.summary_zh: 作为行为科学和交通领域的专家，赵将这些研究与人工智能和公共政策相结合，以解决城市面临的一些最紧迫的挑战。

items.title: The consequences of relying on AI for accurate news
items.summary: A Media Lab study shows that, much like how GPS has weakened our navigation skills, AI can make us worse at detecting fake news.
items.title_zh: 依靠人工智能获取准确新闻的后果
items.summary_zh: 媒体实验室的一项研究表明，就像 GPS 削弱了我们的导航技能一样，人工智能也会让我们更不擅长检测假新闻。

items.title: Bitcoin's future as revolutionary as the smartphone, according to CoinDesk
items.summary: CoinDesk’s president of indices and data has a message for investors: Don’t count out bitcoin.
items.title_zh: CoinDesk 表示，比特币的未来将像智能手机一样具有革命性
items.summary_zh: CoinDesk 的指数和数据总裁向投资者传达了一条信息：不要指望比特币。

items.title: Mideast Live Updates: U.S. Eases Sanctions on Iranian Oil, but Progress on Nuclear Issues Is Muddy
items.summary: Vice President JD Vance said Iran had agreed to invite U.N. nuclear inspectors into the country, but the Iranian side said it had made “no new commitments.” Inspections had been limited since President Trump tore up an Obama-era deal in 2018.
items.title_zh: 中东实时动态：美国放松对伊朗石油制裁，但核问题进展不明朗
items.summary_zh: 副总统万斯表示，伊朗已同意邀请联合国核检查员进入该国，但伊朗方面表示“没有做出新的承诺”。自特朗普总统于 2018 年撕毁奥巴马时代的协议以来，检查一直受到限制。

items.title: Ethereum Foundation talent exodus sparks fresh debate over leadership
items.summary: The Ethereum community is once again debating the future of the foundation after co-executive director Hsiao-Wei Wang announced she would step down.
items.title_zh: 以太坊基金会人才外流引发关于领导力的新争论
items.summary_zh: 在联合执行董事王小伟宣布辞职后，以太坊社区再次讨论基金会的未来。

items.title: Bitmine added $92 million of ETH, with Tom Lee continuing to believe in 'crypto spring'
items.summary: The largest Ethereum treasury firm slowed its buying pace but remains on track to reach its goal of owning 5% of ETH supply.
items.title_zh: Bitmine 增持 9200 万美元 ETH，Tom Lee 继续相信“加密货币春天”
items.summary_zh: 最大的以太坊财务公司放慢了购买速度，但仍有望实现拥有 5% ETH 供应量的目标。

items.title: Bitmine, SharpLink and Joe Lubin back Ethlabs nonprofit to advance Ethereum’s ‘next phase’ of growth
items.summary: Ethlabs, backed by Joe Lubin and the two largest ETH DATs, Bitmine and SharpLink, will focus on institutional adoption.
items.title_zh: Bitmine、SharpLink 和 Joe Lubin 支持 Ethlabs 非营利组织，以推动以太坊的“下一阶段”增长
items.summary_zh: Ethlabs 在 Joe Lubin 和两个最大的 ETH DAT Bitmine 和 SharpLink 的支持下，将专注于机构采用。

items.title: Bitcoin treasury Strive’s shares jump as company’s holdings near 20,000 BTC
items.summary: The bitcoin treasury company founded by Vivek Ramaswamy saw its shares jump about 10% in early trading Monday.
items.title_zh: 比特币金库Strive的股价上涨，公司持有的比特币接近20,000个比特币
items.summary_zh: 由 Vivek Ramaswamy 创立的比特币金库公司股价周一早盘上涨约 10%。

items.title: New usage analytics and updated spend controls for enterprises
items.summary: OpenAI introduces new spend controls and usage analytics for ChatGPT Enterprise, helping organizations manage costs and scale AI with confidence.
items.title_zh: 新的使用情况分析和更新的企业支出控制
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 为 ChatGPT Enterprise 引入了新的支出控制和使用分析，帮助组织充满信心地管理成本并扩展 AI。

items.title: A near-autonomous AI chemist improves a challenging reaction in medicinal chemistry
items.summary: OpenAI and Molecule.one show how a near-autonomous AI chemist using GPT-5.4 improved a key drug-making reaction, advancing medicinal chemistry research.
items.title_zh: 近乎自主的人工智能化学家改善了药物化学中具有挑战性的反应
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 和 Molecule.one 展示了一位近乎自主的 AI 化学家如何使用 GPT-5.4 改进关键的制药反应，从而推进药物化学研究。

items.title: Introducing LifeSciBench
items.summary: Introducing LifeSciBench, an expert-authored, expert-reviewed benchmark for evaluating how AI systems handle real-world life science research tasks and decisions.
items.title_zh: LifeSciBench 简介
items.summary_zh: 隆重推出 LifeSciBench，这是一个由专家撰写、专家评审的基准，用于评估人工智能系统如何处理现实世界的生命科学研究任务和决策。

items.title: Predicting model behavior before release by simulating deployment
items.summary: OpenAI introduces Deployment Simulation, a method to predict AI model behavior before deployment using real conversation data to improve safety and evaluation accuracy.
items.title_zh: 通过模拟部署来预测发布前的模型行为
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 引入了部署模拟，这是一种在部署前使用真实对话数据预测 AI 模型行为的方法，以提高安全性和评估准确性。

items.title: MosaicLeaks: Can your research agent keep a secret?
items.title_zh: MosaicLeaks：你的研究代理人能保守秘密吗？

items.title: Is it agentic enough? Benchmarking open models on your own tooling
items.title_zh: 是否足够代理？在您自己的工具上对开放模型进行基准测试

items.title: New research shows how AMIE, our medical AI, could help manage health conditions.
items.summary: Research in “Nature” shows our conversational AI system matches primary care physicians in complex disease management.
items.title_zh: 新研究表明我们的医疗人工智能 AMIE 如何帮助管理健康状况。
items.summary_zh: 《自然》杂志的研究表明，我们的对话式人工智能系统在复杂疾病管理方面与初级保健医生相匹配。

items.title: The latest AI news we announced in May 2026
items.summary: Here are Google’s latest AI updates from May 2026
items.title_zh: 我们于 2026 年 5 月公布的最新 AI 新闻
items.summary_zh: 以下是 Google 自 2026 年 5 月起最新的 AI 更新

items.title: In game theory, generalists sometimes win out over specialists
items.summary: Researchers show that for certain kinds of games, an overlooked class of algorithms performs much better than expected.
items.title_zh: 在博弈论中，通才有时会战胜专家
items.summary_zh: 研究人员表明，对于某些类型的游戏，一类被忽视的算法的表现比预期要好得多。

items.title: Startup’s nuclear-inspired cooling system could make data centers more sustainable
items.summary: Founded by two researchers from MIT, Ferveret reduces the amount of energy and water required to cool the chips that power AI.
items.title_zh: 初创公司的核冷却系统可以使数据中心更具可持续性
items.summary_zh: Ferveret 由麻省理工学院的两名研究人员创立，可减少冷却人工智能芯片所需的能源和水量。

items.title: Can anyone join Musk in the trillionaire club? Zuckerberg has best shot, according to prediction markets
items.summary: The Meta CEO is seen as next to join the Tesla and SpaceX CEO. Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang is seen as the second-most-likely.
items.title_zh: 有人能加入马斯克的万亿富翁俱乐部吗？根据预测市场，扎克伯格是最好的选择
items.summary_zh: Meta 首席执行官被认为是继特斯拉和 SpaceX 首席执行官之后的下一位首席执行官。英伟达首席执行官黄仁勋被认为是第二个最有可能的人。

items.title: The average SpaceX buyer post-IPO is almost under water after two-day slide
items.summary: Shares of SpaceX fell as much as 7% Thursday to $178, leaving the stock trading roughly in line with its volume-weighted average price of just under $180.
items.title_zh: SpaceX 首次公开募股后的平均买家在经历了两天的下滑后几乎陷入困境
items.summary_zh: 周四，SpaceX 股价下跌 7%，至 178 美元，该股交易价格大致与其略低于 180 美元的成交量加权平均价格一致。

items.title: Vance says Iran will allow nuclear inspectors back into the country
items.summary: The US vice-president says a great deal of progress has been made after the first round of talks between the US and Iran.
items.title_zh: 万斯表示伊朗将允许核检查人员返回该国
items.summary_zh: 美国副总统表示，美国和伊朗第一轮会谈后取得了很大进展。

items.title: At least 13 killed and dozens injured after Qatar gas explosion
items.summary: The city's main liquified natural gas (LNG) processing site suffered a "technical accident" in the Ras Laffan industrial zone.
items.title_zh: 卡塔尔天然气爆炸造成至少13人死亡、数十人受伤
items.summary_zh: 该市主要液化天然气（LNG）加工基地位于拉斯拉凡工业区遭遇“技术事故”。

items.title: Myanmar army killed over 700 civilians in six months, UN says
items.summary: The new UN report says the 702 civilian deaths over six months last year included 153 children.
items.title_zh: 联合国称缅甸军队在六个月内杀害了700多名平民
items.summary_zh: 联合国新报告称，去年六个月内有 702 名平民死亡，其中包括 153 名儿童。

items.title: Clive Davis, music mogul behind Whitney Houston and Bruce Springsteen, dies aged 94
items.summary: The record company executive also worked with Billy Joel, Pink Floyd, Alicia Keys and Aerosmith.
items.title_zh: 惠特尼·休斯顿和布鲁斯·斯普林斯汀背后的音乐大亨克莱夫·戴维斯去世，享年 94 岁
items.summary_zh: 这位唱片公司高管还与比利·乔尔、平克·弗洛伊德、艾丽西亚·凯斯和 Aerosmith 合作过。

items.title: Red heat alerts issued in France, Italy and Spain as 40C temperatures forecast
items.summary: The heatwave conditions are forecast to intensify in the coming days across central and western Europe.
items.title_zh: 法国、意大利和西班牙发布高温警报，预计气温将达到 40 摄氏度
items.summary_zh: 预计未来几天中欧和西欧的热浪天气将加剧。

items.title: WhatsApp to be led by Indian start-up founder as Will Cathcart steps back
items.summary: WhatsApp's leadership shake-up comes as Meta looks to strengthen its app's already booming presence in India.
items.title_zh: Will Cathcart 退出后 WhatsApp 将由印度初创公司创始人领导
items.summary_zh: WhatsApp 领导层变动之际，Meta 希望加强其应用程序在印度已经蓬勃发展的影响力。

items.title: Kenya minister found in contempt of court over US-backed Ebola centre
items.summary: Aden Duale defied a High Court order to stop building work on a controversial US-funded facility.
items.title_zh: 肯尼亚部长因美国支持的埃博拉中心而被判藐视法庭
items.summary_zh: 亚丁·杜阿勒 (Aden Duale) 藐视高等法院停止建设一处有争议的美国资助设施的命令。

items.title: Twins marry twins in joyous Nigerian joint wedding
items.summary: Brothers Taiwo and Kehinde Oguntoye speak to the BBC after getting hitched to twin sisters.
items.title_zh: 双胞胎在尼日利亚欢乐的联合婚礼中结婚
items.summary_zh: 塔伊沃 (Taiwo) 和凯欣德·奥贡托耶 (Kehinde Oguntoye) 兄弟在与双胞胎姐妹结婚后接受 BBC 采访。

items.title: Largest ever cocaine bust in Australia after police raid underground bunker
items.summary: Police seized 2.7 tonnes of cocaine worth an estimated A$816m after searching a property in western Sydney.
items.title_zh: 警方突袭地下掩体后，澳大利亚破获有史以来最大规模的可卡因
items.summary_zh: 警方在搜查悉尼西部的一处房产后，查获了 2.7 吨可卡因，价值估计 8.16 亿澳元。

items.title: Keir Starmer Resigns as UK Prime Minister
items.summary: His departure in the coming weeks clears a path for Andy Burnham, a popular Labour Party mayor, to become the country’s seventh prime minister in a decade.
items.title_zh: 凯尔·斯塔默辞去英国首相职务
items.summary_zh: 他在未来几周的离职为受欢迎的工党市长安迪·伯纳姆（Andy Burnham）成为十年来第七任总理扫清了道路。

items.title: Cuba’s Fuel Crisis Brings Schools to a Standstill
items.summary: The country’s already-struggling schools are ending the academic year early because of a crippling fuel shortage caused by the U.S. oil blockade.
items.title_zh: 古巴的燃料危机导致学校停顿
items.summary_zh: 由于美国石油封锁造成严重的燃料短缺，该国本已陷入困境的学校将提前结束学年。

items.title: Shootout Suspect Is Dead After Killing Montreal Police Officer, Authorities Say
items.summary: Fady Dagher, the city’s police chief, said that the “immediate threat to the public is no longer present” and that sheltering in place was no longer required.
items.title_zh: 当局称枪战嫌疑人在杀死蒙特利尔警察后死亡
items.summary_zh: 该市警察局长法迪·达格尔表示，“对公众的直接威胁已不复存在”，并且不再需要就地避难。

items.title: Pakistan Plans to Cut Tax on Menstrual Pads, but Many Say It’s Not Enough
items.summary: Activists said more action was needed to solve the larger problem: Only 12 percent of Pakistani women and girls use safe, commercially made menstrual products.
items.title_zh: 巴基斯坦计划削减月经垫税收，但许多人表示这还不够
items.summary_zh: 活动人士表示，需要采取更多行动来解决更大的问题：只有 12% 的巴基斯坦妇女和女孩使用安全的商业制造的月经产品。

items.title: Ukraine Escalates Crimea Attacks, Creating a New Pressure Point for Russia
items.summary: To pressure Moscow, Ukraine is stepping up an air campaign to isolate the peninsula, which Russia annexed in 2014.
items.title_zh: 乌克兰升级克里米亚袭击，为俄罗斯制造新的压力点
items.summary_zh: 为了向莫斯科施压，乌克兰正在加强空袭，以孤立俄罗斯于 2014 年吞并的半岛。

items.title: Strive says digital credit selloff was a liquidation event, not a credit crisis
items.summary: A sharp selloff in digital credit products exposed growing pains in a young market, a Strive executive argues the underlying credit fundamentals remain intact.
items.title_zh: 斯特里夫表示，数字信贷抛售是清算事件，而不是信贷危机
items.summary_zh: Strive 的一位高管认为，数字信贷产品的大幅抛售暴露了年轻市场的成长阵痛，潜在的信贷基本面仍然完好无损。

items.title: Crypto's second U.S. lobbying front — tax policy — sees industry push on mining, staking
items.summary: The crypto sector's leading U.S. advocacy groups asked the U.S. House's tax committee to advance a bill to clarify treatment of assets from mining and staking.
items.title_zh: 加密货币在美国的第二个游说阵线——税收政策——看到行业推动挖矿​​、质押
items.summary_zh: 美国加密货币行业的主要倡导团体要求美国众议院税务委员会提出一项法案，以澄清采矿和质押资产的处理方式。

items.title: OKX and NYSE partner to bridge tradfi and crypto markets in joint venture led by Andrew Cuomo
items.summary: The goal is to enable OKX’s 120 million global users to access ICE futures and NYSE tokenized equities markets, the two U.S. companies announced.
items.title_zh: OKX 和 NYSE 合作，成立由 Andrew Cuomo 领导的合资企业，在 tradfi 和加密货币市场之间架起桥梁
items.summary_zh: 两家美国公司宣布，其目标是让 OKX 的 1.2 亿全球用户能够进入 ICE 期货和 NYSE 代币化股票市场。

items.title: Solana treasury firm Solmate’s largest stakeholder sues board for self-dealing, fiduciary breaches
items.summary: Board members Ron Sade and Keren Maimon personally bought about 2.298 million SLMT shares at $4.97, diluting shareholders ~20%.
items.title_zh: Solana 财务公司 Solmate 的最大利益相关者起诉董事会，指控其自我交易、违反信托行为
items.summary_zh: 董事会成员 Ron Sade 和 Keren Maimon 个人以 4.97 美元的价格购买了约 229.8 万股 SLMT 股票，稀释股东约 20%。

items.title: MoonPay expands into back-office financial operations with AI accounting startup Entendre acquisition
items.summary: MoonPay has made at least four other acquisitions this year as it works to expand via MoonPay Trade and MoonPay Institutional.
items.title_zh: MoonPay 收购人工智能会计初创公司 Entender，进军后台财务运营
items.summary_zh: MoonPay 今年至少进行了四次其他收购，致力于通过 MoonPay Trade 和 MoonPayInstitutional 进行扩张。

items.title: Securitize asks court to reject tZERO’s ‘meritless’ tokenization patent allegations
items.summary: Securitize alleged that tZERO's actions are "nothing more than the culmination" of shareholder pressure to capitalize on the patents.
items.title_zh: Securitize 请求法院驳回 tZERO 的“毫无根据”的代币化专利指控
items.summary_zh: Securitize 声称 tZERO 的行为“只不过是股东利用这些专利施加压力的结果”。

items.title: Intercontinental Exchange, OKX expand access to tokenized equities via joint venture co-chaired by former Gov. Cuomo
items.summary: The new joint venture will enable OKX customers in the U.S. and internationally to access ICE futures and NYSE tokenized equities markets.

items.summary_zh: 新的合资企业将使 OKX 在美国和国际上的客户能够进入 ICE 期货和 NYSE 代币化股票市场。

items.title: Daybreak: Tools for securing every organization in the world

items.title: Patch the Planet: a Daybreak initiative to support open source maintainers
items.summary: OpenAI introduces Patch the Planet, a Daybreak initiative helping open-source maintainers find, validate, and fix vulnerabilities with AI and expert review.

items.title: Codex-maxxing for long-running work

items.title: Improving health intelligence in ChatGPT
